description: Shared Renovate preset for the wicked-* family. Consumer repos extend this with: "extends": ["github>mikeparcewski/wicked-ci"]

packageRules.description: Group every GitHub Actions pin bump into a single PR per repo; auto-merge minor/patch/digest so the family stays on current actions without manual triage. This is what keeps checkout/setup-node/etc. from drifting across repos again.
Shared runtime + dev deps used by more than one sibling. Group them so a bump lands the same way everywhere and we notice cross-repo impact in one place.
wicked-* siblings consumed as npm deps (e.g. wicked-bus in brain/interactive) — surface but never auto-merge; a sibling bump can carry behavior changes.
